description: A patient is checking out and needs to schedule a 3-month follow-up appointment with their physician.

nodes.task_description: Verify clinician access and patient identity.
Identify the patient's record and the provider they need to see.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the patient and the specified physician.

nodes.task_description: View the provider's schedule to find the next available appointments in approximately three months.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds and offers the patient several available time slots.

nodes.task_description: Book the selected appointment and provide the patient with an appointment reminder card.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the appointment and confirms the details with the patient.
